Check-in message from Dave Device: Dave IMEI: 301434061162620 Message: I'm OK. My location is 37.796875, -119.26253 Check-in sent at: 17 Jul 2026 22:58:12 (UTC) View on map
Made camp for the night at the foot of Donohue Pass. Tomorrow morning the first 4ish miles have 2600 ft of climb. Probably make an early night of it and rest up.
Today was great. This trail is incredible and so are the people. Ellie, if you’re reading this, thank you so much for the hat!! It’s keeping me warm tonight.

Stopped for a break about halfway up the pass. Making better time than expected. Next 2 miles are a slog… hoping to hit the pass by noon.

Stopped for the night. Made it over Donohue Pass!!! It was brutal but I told myself if I could do that I can do any day on this trail.
Hoped to make it to Thousand Island Lake today but listening to my body. I’m beat. Hopefully this means I can sleep tonight; have been averaging about 4 hrs/night bc altitude

Check-in message from Dave Device: Dave IMEI: 301434061162620 Message: I'm OK. My location is 37.782898, -119.12636 Check-in sent at: 20 Jul 2026 02:07:42 (UTC) View on map
Started experiencing altitude sickness last night (headache, lightheadedness, confusion, etc). Texted a doctor and got advice to descend and rest 24-48 hours.
I’m safe and well and stopped for the night, and I already have my accommodations booked. Hoping to be back at it Weds. longer update later or tomorrow?
